SmartFarm
Home Finance Inventory features

Modern Farm Management Software

One platform to plan, track, manage finances, sell produce, and make better decisions — designed for today's progressive farmers.

Powerful Capabilities

Everything you need to run a more efficient, profitable, and future-ready farm — in one integrated platform.

Task & Work Management

Assign tasks, set deadlines, track progress, attach photos/notes, get reminders — keep the whole team aligned.

Livestock Management

Animal records, breeding, health events, vaccinations, milk logs, weight tracking, treatments & genealogy.

Crop Planning & Management

Field planning, planting schedules, input tracking, growth stages, applications, yield forecasting & rotations.

Farm Accounting

Income & expense tracking, invoices, cost per hectare/animal, profitability analysis, cash flow overview.

Farm Mapping

GPS field boundaries, zone management, soil sampling points, irrigation layout, asset placement.

Climate & Weather

Hyper-local forecasts, rainfall alerts, disease risk models, growing degree days, frost warnings.

Orders & eCommerce

Online store, customer orders, delivery scheduling, payment integration, direct-to-consumer sales.

Reports & Analytics

Custom dashboards, yield reports, financial summaries, input efficiency, trend analysis & benchmarking.

Admin & Security

Role-based access, audit logs, data backup, multi-user support, mobile & desktop security.

Resource Management

Machinery logs, fuel usage, maintenance schedules, labour allocation, equipment utilization tracking.

App Integrations

Connect with weather APIs, accounting tools (QuickBooks, Xero), e-commerce platforms, soil sensors & more.

Ready to transform your farm?

Join hundreds of forward-thinking farmers who already use SmartFarm to save time, reduce costs, and increase profitability.

No credit card required • Cancel anytime
